message:
refactor(blocking_pool): simplify thread pool implementation

Streamlines the blocking pool implementation by removing unnecessary
complexity and reducing code by ~50%.

## Changes (-50 lines, +26 lines)
- Simplify worker thread lifecycle management
- Remove redundant synchronization primitives
- Consolidate shutdown handling logic
- Clean up idle thread management

The blocking pool now has fewer moving parts while maintaining the
same behavior for handling CPU-bound and blocking I/O operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2kwn","title":"Implement ShutdownStats collection for server drain lifecycle","description":"ShutdownStats is defined in src/server/shutdown.rs (drained, force_closed, duration) but never populated. Implement:
1. Track drain start time when begin_drain() is called
2. Add a drain_with_stats() method that orchestrates the full drain flow: wait for connections to close, handle timeout, count drained vs force-closed, produce ShutdownStats
3. Add tests for stats collection","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PinkMountain","created_at":"2026-01-29T17:22:24.936879277Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T17:40:39.196070728Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T17:40:39.195985760Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"bd-hszn","title":"gRPC Framework Verification Suite (unit tests, E2E, streaming)","description":"# gRPC Framework Verification Suite

## Purpose
Comprehensive verification for the gRPC framework (3or, tonic equivalent) ensuring protocol compliance, streaming correctness, and cancel-safety.

## Test Categories

### 1. Unit Tests
- Service definitions: codegen output
- Request/Response types: encoding, decoding
- Metadata: headers, trailers
- Status codes: mapping, propagation
- Interceptors: client and server

### 2. Streaming Pattern Tests
- Unary: single request, single response
- Server streaming: single request, stream response
- Client streaming: stream request, single response
- Bidirectional: stream request, stream response

### 3. E2E Scenarios
| Scenario | Verifies |
|----------|----------|
| Unary RPC | Basic request/response |
| Server streaming | Large result set |
| Client streaming | Upload pattern |
| Bidirectional chat | Real-time communication |
| Deadline propagation | Timeout inheritance |
| Cancel mid-stream | Clean termination |
| Metadata round-trip | Header/trailer handling |
| Reflection service | Service discovery |

### 4. Protocol Compliance Tests
- gRPC over HTTP/2
- Message framing
- Compression: gzip, deflate, none
- Content-Type validation
- Status code mapping

### 5. Load Tests
- Concurrent RPCs
- Long-running streams
- Connection multiplexing
- Backpressure handling

### 6. Security Tests
- TLS integration
- mTLS client auth
- Token validation

## Logging Requirements
- RPC events logged with method names
- On failure: dump message state, stream state
- Timing: request/response latency per RPC

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All streaming patterns have tests
- [ ] Protocol compliance verified
- [ ] Cancel-safety for all patterns
- [ ] Load tests pass without leaks
- [ ] `cargo test grpc` passes deterministically

## Verification Commands
```bash
cargo test --package asupersync --lib grpc
cargo test --test grpc_e2e
```","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"PinkMountain","created_at":"2026-01-22T19:49:43.146586417Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T07:24:11.064971182Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T07:24:11.064895852Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-hszn","depends_on_id":"asupersync-3or","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T06:20:45Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-hzrb","title":"[Harmonize] Merge Parallel Runtime EPICs: n5o → xrc","description":"# [Harmonize] Merge Parallel Runtime EPICs: n5o → xrc

## Purpose
Map n5o (Tokio-runtime equivalent) sub-tasks to xrc (Phase 1) hierarchy.

## Sub-Tasks to Map
- 8z9: spawn variants
- ior: thread-safe region
- 9d3: work-stealing
- c61: runtime config

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] n5o depends on xrc (n5o is alias, xrc is canonical)
- [ ] n5o description notes it's a tokio-equivalence alias
- [ ] xrc priority updated to P1 (was P2)
- [ ] All xrc.* sub-tasks have matching priorities
- [ ] `br show asupersync-xrc` shows correct hierarchy

## Verification
```bash
br show asupersync-n5o  # Should depend on xrc
br show asupersync-xrc  # Should be P1 with full sub-task tree
```","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ClaudeOpus45","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:28:21.066247555Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T03:15:02.103198644Z","closed_at":"2026-01-23T02:34:21.037258253Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-hzrb","depends_on_id":"asupersync-n5o","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T06:20:45Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-hzrb","depends_on_id":"asupersync-xrc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T06:20:45Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-hzrb","depends_on_id":"bd-zs64","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T06:20:45Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":12,"issue_id":"bd-hzrb","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Checked xrc.* priorities: 7 items are non-P1 (xrc.1.4 P3; xrc.5 / xrc.5.1/.2/.3 P3; xrc.6 / xrc.6.1 P4). If acceptance criteria expects all xrc.* to be P1, these need adjustment or criteria should scope to Phase 1 core.","created_at":"2026-01-23T03:15:02Z"}]}
